name: solana_token_safety_check
description: Free safety check for any Solana SPL token. Returns risk score (0-100), risk level, summary, name, symbol, liquidity rating, top-10 holder concentration, honeypot status, token age, delta detection (score changes), Token-2022 detection, and degradation status. If degraded=true, some checks failed — risk_score includes uncertainty penalties and may overestimate risk. Full report with authority addresses, holder breakdown, LP lock status, honeypot details, and change detection available via x402 payment ($0.008 USDC) at GET /v1/check?mint=<address>.

mint_address.description: Solana token mint address in base58 format
